Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: California model Nicole sues her ex-boyfriend Peter for property exchange of their pet dog that he kept after the breakup.
Video.title: Serrano vs. Plemons

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: An unruly puppy and Darius' girlfriend's panty problem has Darius issuing his girlfriend, Ife, an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wilson vs. Graham

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: A shocking twist ending determines the future of Latiana and Wynton's rocky nine-year relationship.
Video.title: Weaver vs. Greene

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: Breon issues his girlfriend, Chenika, an ultimatum regarding her refusal to have another baby and grow their family of nine to 10.
Video.title: Holland vs. Bryant

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: Frank sues his daughter Patricia, claiming she pocketed $2,010 in insurance money after a car accident. Patricia says the car was a gift, she paid insurance, and blames his new partner for turning him against her.
Video.title: Father/Daughter Crisis

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: John must answer for his severe smoking addiction after his girlfriend, Debbie, issues him an ultimatum.
Video.title: Goodman vs. McDonnell

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: The results of a double polygraph determine the future of newlyweds Sierra and Victor's marriage.
Video.title: Buckner vs. Banks

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: Nicholas claims Jaleel’s loose dog attacked his Yorkshire Terrier, leaving it injured and requiring $475.48 in vet bills. Jaleel denies the attack, saying Nicholas didn’t mention injuries at the time.
Video.title: Dog Attack Anger

Video.summary: Shahbod Hosseini sues Rosie Dehghani for $1,300, claiming her pharmacy tech course was a scam. Rosie counters that Shahbod didn’t complete the work and owes her $700. She insists her program is legitimate, with students earning high-paying jobs.
Video.title: You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class

Image.alt: You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class
You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class
You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class

Video.summary: Nicholas Grassa sues Merri Phillips for $145 in extra labor costs after a power steering pump he bought was deemed defective by his mechanic. Merri claims the pump was in perfect condition and blames the mechanic's skills.
Video.title: Car Parts Dealer Disaster

Video.summary: Angel Guzman sues Damaris Damian for $3,000, claiming she kidnapped his Shih Tzu, Maxie, after he spent $2,000 at the vet. Damaris says Angel gave her Maxie to protect him from his Pitbull.
Video.title: You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back

Image.alt: You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back
You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back
You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back

Video.summary: Tajanea is suing her ex-boyfriend for over $2,000 after she claimed he damaged her car and apartment.
Video.title: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Image.alt: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Video.summary: The plaintiff says her sister tried to push her out of a car and strangle her with a seat belt.
Video.title: Sibling Rivalry

Video.summary: Malik is here to peition the court for a paternity test after believing his girlfriend was cheating on him.
Video.title: Unplanned Parenthood

Video.summary: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.
Video.title: Stripped Bare

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his ex-girlfriend for the entire $5 million which she won via a scratch-off ticket.
Video.title: Tickets to lies

Video.summary: Alexa is suing her boyfriend for abruptly canceling a trip of a lifetime because she needed to bring her kid.
Video.title: Adults only

Video.summary: Mario is suing the neighborhood psychic, Lydia, after promising to remove his curse...for a fee.
Video.title: Psychic promises

Video.summary: Guadalupe is suing Thomas, the owner of a Quinceanera dress shop, for pain and suffering, and the dress.
Video.title: Franken-dress

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: Jonah sues ex-friend Elliot for $25,000, defamation, and IP theft, aiming to disband "The Wizarding Warband." Elliot disputes, blaming Jonah's leadership for league decline.
Video.title: Battle Royale

Video.summary: Barbara sues Emilio's strip club for $30,000, alleging negligence and emotional distress. She claims whiplash from Jackson's performance and a collapsing chair. Emilio denies responsibility, citing safety and Barbara's drinking.
Video.title: Tornado Tassel

Video.summary: Damien sues Sal for $35 million, alleging Sal's car service ruined his marrage by dropping his wife at his mistress' house. Sal denies fault, prioritizing business growth.
Video.title: Car Service Scandals

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout

Video.summary: Annie sues ex-best friend Olivia for $150K emotional distress. Olivia, once maid of honor, hijacked wedding plans, changing venue and dresses. Annie feels betrayed, removed Olivia from bridal party. Olivia defends, says she improved wedding.
Video.title: Nuptial Nemesis

Video.summary: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.
Video.title: Shadows of Doubt
